title: microsorum luzonicum
intro: Microsorum luzonicum, also known as Java fern, is a type of aquatic plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Microsorum luzonicum is often used as a tea or infusion, or dried and made into capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
